summary: Comprehensive testing of MIS Dashboard with new Dashboard Overview design, RBAC, and MonthlyMIS inline editing. All features working correctly. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified.

minor.issue: Agent user has empty 'id' field in response, though login works

passed_tests: Dashboard Overview page renders with new design (greeting, stat tiles, rate rings, status bars, bank table)
Personalized greeting shows user's first name (Good Morning, Admin / Good Morning, Test)
6-column stat tiles display correctly (Total, Sanctioned, Disbursed Amt, Disbursed, Declined, Pending)
SVG rate rings show Conversion, Decline, and Pending percentages
Status Breakdown horizontal bars render correctly
Bank-wise Analysis table displays with filter dropdown
Bank filter on Dashboard works correctly
Login flow works for admin (admin@mhpfintech.com / Admin@123)
Login flow works for agent (agent@mhpfintech.com / Admin@123)
RBAC: Admin sees all loan data on dashboard and loans page
RBAC: Agent sees only their own loan data (0 loans for test agent)
RBAC: Delete button visible only for admin users on Loans page
RBAC: Delete button hidden for agent users
Delete loan functionality works (admin only) - confirmed with toast 'Loan deleted'
Agent cannot delete loans (403 Forbidden)
Agent cannot access /api/users endpoint (403 Forbidden)
MonthlyMIS page loads correctly with month grouping
MonthlyMIS inline status editing works - dropdown appears on cell click
Status dropdown in MonthlyMIS is NOT clipped (verified with bounding box)
Sidebar navigation works for all pages (Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics, Schemes, Users, Statuses, Field Config, Settings)
Loan CRUD operations work correctly (create, read, update, delete)
Analytics endpoints return correct data (overview, by-bank, by-agent, unique-values)
Schemes and Statuses management endpoints work
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test loan for testing inline editing (Test Customer, HDFC, Jan-25)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Dashboard has new creative layout with MiniStat tiles, RateRing SVG components, HBar status breakdown, and bank-wise analysis table. RBAC is fully functional - admin sees all data, agent sees only their own. Delete button correctly hidden for non-admin users. MonthlyMIS inline editing works with status dropdown not clipped. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_mis_dashboard.py cover auth, RBAC, loans CRUD, and analytics.

dashboard_new_design.greeting: Personalized greeting with time-based message and user's first name
dashboard_new_design.stat_tiles: 6-column grid with Total, Sanctioned, Disbursed Amt, Disbursed, Declined, Pending
dashboard_new_design.rate_rings: SVG circular progress rings for Conversion, Decline, Pending rates
dashboard_new_design.status_breakdown: Horizontal bar chart showing status distribution
dashboard_new_design.bank_analysis: Table with Bank, Apps, Sanctioned, Disbursed, Share columns with filter

rbac.admin: Full access to all data and features including delete
rbac.agent: Limited to own data only, no delete button, no access to user management

monthly_mis.inline_editing: Click on cell to edit, dropdown for status/scheme fields
monthly_mis.dropdown_not_clipped: Verified dropdown is visible and not cut off
